name: ASRock B760I LIGHTNING WiFi Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-8600+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Phantom Gaming 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B760I LIGHTNING WiFi Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mini-ITX gaming motherboard for LGA 1700 with PCIe 5.0, high DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E.
